fallbacks.subagents: Sequential self-review in a fresh context window: re-read the task brief and the exact base..head diff package with no implementation context carried over. This is a degraded substitute and MUST NOT be reported as equivalent to an independent reviewer.
fallbacks.task_tracking: Track task state in .wcbs/runs/<run-id>/progress-ledger.jsonl instead of a native task list.
fallbacks.browser_verification: Capture a screenshot or page text through the agent's browsing capability and attach it as evidence; automated assertions are unavailable.
fallbacks.human_approval_gates: Halt, print the exact pending action, and require an explicit human reply before proceeding.

install: Commit Manus.md at the repository root and attach it, or point the agent at it, at session start.
rollback: Restore the previous revision from version control.
limitations: Automatic session-start ingestion of Manus.md is NOT established. The operator must attach or reference the file each session, so this adapter is Manual by definition, not Full. Upgrade only after a clean-session activation scenario passes.
deprecation: None. Adapter is active but requires per-session activation.
